items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Golden Check Basket Bag
This basket-style handbag is eye-catching and stylish, blending practical functionality with an elegant silhouette. Adorned with fluorescent pink animal print embroidery throughout, the front is accented with a Christian Dior Paris logo to elevate the style. Spacious interior with a detachable matching zip pouch, and a detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Front accented with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable zip pouch with Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable embroidered shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Dimensions: 35 x 20.5 x 11 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, sunglasses, and 1 card holder

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
CE New Mini16 Shoulder Bag
The 16 series has a new model again. This time, unlike the previous plain leather, it uses durable grainy leather, showing more texture. Despite being small, the capacity is impressive; it fits two phones easily. Can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, with an adjustable strap. Lightweight!!
Style: Versatile item
Capacity: Among mini bags, the capacity is top-tier, very spacious
Model: 10m443
Color: Tan Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18×12×3.5cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
🌟Full Rhinestone 3-in-1
The most beautiful and sparkling rhinestone bag. Imported rhinestone mesh, a shiny exterior, and a bling-bling effect under night lights that is very eye-catching and turns heads!! Multi-functional, the favorite part is the small bag hanging on the strap (mini bag). You'll get compliments wherever you go. This sparkling bag also pairs well with outfits. With it, you are the center of attention!
Size: 22L x 18H x 6.5W cm
Style: 1BH204 with Rhinestones
